synthesis.summary: DHI surged 7.16% today with no supplied news to explain the move. The 13% 5-day gain, elevated RSI of 72, and only modest volume (1.21x relative) suggest possible sector rotation into homebuilders, options-driven momentum, or a catalyst (e.g., earnings, guidance, macro data) not captured in the provided news feed.
